PLAINTIFF TO GET POSSESSION OF PREMISES BY 3/31/00 PLAINTIFF WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAMAGES FROM 1/19/00 TO 3/31/00 AND IS TO GIVE DFT.'S ATTY A $500 RELOCATION CHECK WHEN DFT. GIVES PLNTF. THE KEYS. DEFENDANT WAIVES CLAIMS TO $1250 SECURITY DEPOSIT AND TO THE SECOND INSTALLMENT OF THE RELOCATION FEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $500. PLAINTIFF IS TO DISMISS THE UD IF DFT. COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT. DFT. WAIVES COSTS IN THIS ACTION. DFT. RETAINS ALL OTHER CLAIMS FILED IN ACTION 310611. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, REPORTER: RHONDA FUNG, CLERK: IRIS L. HAMMER DEPT. 602
